nodes.context: Outlaw motorcycle club based in Blenheim, New Zealand, active since the 1970s.
New Zealand biker gang, member of the A-Team alliance.

International outlaw motorcycle club; Lone Legion patched over to Outlaws MC in 2019.

edges.evidence_quote: According to media and Police the club is a member of the "A-Team", an alliance between several NZ biker groups including the Outcasts MC, the Epitaph Riders MC, the Forty-Fives MC, the Southern Vikings MC, Satan's Slaves MC, Sinn Fein MC and the Lost Breed MC .
edges.context: Lone Legion is a member of the A-Team alliance with Outcasts MC.

edges.evidence_quote: In 2019, Carl Bradley, writing in the NZ Herald, reported that the Lone Legion had patched over to the Outlaws MC.
edges.context: Lone Legion patched over to Outlaws MC in 2019, becoming a chapter of Outlaws MC.
